zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Halsham於1392年出生在英國英格蘭素可霍沙安時，他的父親Sir. John Halsham36歲，母親Philippa de Strathbogie of Atholl30歲。他和Thorlegh至少有1個女兒。他去世於1441年2月28日在英國英格蘭肯特阿福德享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特阿福德。

nameMeanings.name: Halsham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from North and South Walsham (Norfolk) or Walsham le Willows (Suffolk).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Halsham was born in 1392, in Horsham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir. John Halsham, was 36 and his mother, Philippa de Strathbogie of Atholl, was 30. He had at least 1 daughter with Thorlegh. He died on 28 February 1441, in Ashford, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Ashford, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Halsham est né en 1392, à Horsham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir. John Halsham, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Philippa de Strathbogie of Atholl, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Thorlegh. Il est décédé le 28 février 1441, à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Halshamが1392年にイギリスイギリススセックスホールシャムで生まれた時，父Sir. John Halshamは36歳，母Philippa de Strathbogie of Athollは30歳であった。彼はThorleghとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1441年2月28日にイギリスイギリスケントアシュフォードで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントアシュフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Halsham(이)가 1392년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 호르샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir. John Halsham(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa de Strathbogie of Atholl(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Thorlegh(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1441년 2월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 애스h퍼드에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 애스h퍼드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Halsham родился в 1392 г. в местности хауршам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir. John Halsham было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippa de Strathbogie of Atholl, 30. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Thorlegh. Он умер 28 февраля 1441 г. в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.
